---
title: "Batteries"
output: html_document
date: "2024-12-13"
rmd_files: ["Index.Rmd", "01.Data.Rmd", "01a.Car Fires.Rmd", "02.NFIRS.Rmd", "03.CPSC.Rmd", "04.Recapture.Rmd", "05.FAA_Air.Rmd", "06.BESS.Rmd","07.Figures.Rmd"]
---

```{r setup-00, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE)

book_flag <- TRUE
csv_dir <- "csv/"
intmdt_dir <- "rdata/"
# libraries used in this document:
#
## Basic Utility Libraries
# bookdown
# rmarkdown
# knitr
# magrittr
# tidyr
# dplyr
# lubridate
# ggplot2
# parallel
# doParallel
# foreach
#
## Technical Libraries
# maxLik
# rstan
# loo
# textmineR
# stopwords
# SnowballC
# sf?
```
